message:
refactor: consolidate findJSONLPath in doctor/fix to use utils.FindJSONLInDir (bd-74w1)

The duplicate findJSONLPath in doctor/fix/migrate.go now delegates to
utils.FindJSONLInDir for path discovery, adding only an existence check.
setup.go findBeadsDir intentionally kept separate - its simpler CWD-only
semantics with guaranteed non-empty fallback differ from beads.FindBeadsDir.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
